message:
fix(ci): Add typing_extensions for pydantic-core build

The generate_self_schema.py script in pydantic-core requires
typing_extensions on the host Python. Without it, the WASM build
fails with ModuleNotFoundError.

files.patch:
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           sudo apt-get update
           sudo apt-get install -y build-essential lld
-          pip3 install cython
+          pip3 install cython typing_extensions
 
       - name: Install Rust (for pydantic-core)
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
